summary: Implementation review approved GH-100 desktop shell skeleton on head 2d30be19f39ad564bce57c8b3066307336f117ec. The delta establishes the Electron/Vite/React/TypeScript carrier, keeps Electron main/preload limited to OS/local shell context, and does not implement follow-on Task Thread UI scope.
reviewed_validation_summary: `git diff --check` passed; `npm audit --audit-level=high` passed with 0 vulnerabilities; `npm run typecheck` passed; `npm run smoke` passed and built Electron main/preload plus Vite renderer; `npm run start` short launch reached Electron without error output after binary install; `loom doctor --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, and `loom fact-chain --target . --json` passed.
follow_ups: #101/#102/#103/#104 must continue from this shell foundation without expanding GH-100 scope retroactively.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: Authored implementation review approved the GH-100 skeleton head; subsequent drift must remain limited to GH-100 Loom review carrier metadata and review entry binding for this PR.
